summary: No architectural drift after packet 05. Schema, API contracts, CSS design system (46 vars), Fleet Overview UI (15 components), and hash routing all match the spec. 110/110 tests pass. Tracker state is consistent. VCS hygiene: 3 test files and packet 05 code (~500 lines) are uncommitted — recommend committing before next packet.
notes: Six findings, all VCS hygiene or cosmetic: (1) test_fleet_api.py, test_html_shell.py, test_fleet_overview_ui.py are untracked (32 of 110 tests not version-controlled). (2) Packet 05 Fleet Overview UI code (~500 lines) committed via validation tracker update but code changes not included in commit 6bb73f3. (3-4) Stale docstring on get_ui() and stale help text on --scan flag. (5) orch_launch.sh untracked dev artifact. (6) last_commit_hash is an extra additive field in fleet response not in spec §4.1 but forward-compatible. No API shape deviations, no unused CSS properties, no dead code, no schema mismatches, no scope creep across packet boundaries.
